rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings
Implementation-level signal routing should be expressed in implementation annexes after subcomponents and connections are defined
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architectural structure when inserting AGREE contracts
Use only visible identifiers from the input AADL model in AGREE expressions
Place AGREE contracts in the appropriate scope based on whether they reference component ports or implementation bindings
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type contracts define assumptions and guarantees; implementation contracts define bindings and assignments
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations as AGREE variables
